products.name: CHOFORM® 5575 Form-In-Place EMI Gasket
products.descriptor: Robotically dispensed silver-plated aluminum silicone EMI gasket with up to 80 dB shielding effectiveness

evidence.snippet: *   CHOFORM 5575 is a moisture cured silver-plated aluminum filled silicone material offering up to 80 dB shielding effectiveness.

products.name: THERM-A-GAP™ GEL 37 Thermal Interface Material
products.descriptor: Pre-cured single-component thermal gel with 3.7 W/m-K conductivity for drone chipset heat management

evidence.snippet: To mitigate thermal effects, Parker Chomerics has developed [THERM-A-GAP™ GEL 37](https://app.solutions.parker.com/e/er?s=1819831755&lid=35828&elqTrackId=D78A86FC6F7F63CAE69005F7FC0DC7B1&elq=00000000000000000000000000000000&elqaid=24233&elqat=2). Offering a 3.7 W/m-K thermal conductivity, this product is used to conduct the heat from the chipset to the drone’s enclosure.

products.name: Ebrake® Technology
products.descriptor: Electronic braking system for aerospace platforms delivering improved safety and reduced environmental impact

evidence.snippet:
Flying into the Future with Parker's Ebrake® Technology
-------------------------------------------------------
Parker Aerospace is reshaping air travel with advanced electronic braking systems that deliver greater safety while reducing environmental impact. Discover how Parker is helping make every landing safer—and air travel more sustainable.
